name: Commodity Momentum Top-2 + 30% Vol Target
description: Momentum Top-2 within the commodity universe (SSLN, SGLN, COMM, BRNT, CRUD, WCOA) by 6-month trailing return, scaled to 30% annualised volatility. Higher vol budget amplifies commodity momentum signals; selects the two strongest-trending hard assets from metals, energy, and broad commodities.
